Always consult a qualified healthcare professional regarding any medical concerns.

about.heroDescription: We're on a mission to make oral cancer screening accessible to everyone. By combining cutting-edge AI with medical expertise, we're empowering people to take control of their health.
about.whyText1: Oral cancer affects over 50,000 people in the Egypt alone each year. When detected early, the survival rate exceeds 80%. Yet many cases go undiagnosed until advanced stages due to limited access to regular screenings.
about.whyText2: We believe that everyone deserves access to early detection tools, regardless of their location, income, or access to healthcare. Our AI-powered screening platform bridges this gap, providing instant, accurate risk assessments from the comfort of your home.
about.whyText3: Our technology doesn't replace professional medical care—it complements it by helping identify potential concerns early, when treatment is most effective.

values.title: Patient-First Approach
values.description: Every decision we make prioritizes the health and well-being of our users.

values.title: Clinical Accuracy
values.description: Our AI is rigorously validated against expert diagnoses to ensure reliability.

values.title: Privacy & Security
values.description: Your health data is protected with enterprise-grade security and encryption.

values.title: Accessibility
values.description: Making early detection available to everyone, regardless of location or resources.

about.privacyDesc: We take your privacy seriously. Here's how we protect your information.

privacyFeatures.title: No Data Storage
privacyFeatures.description: Images are processed in real-time and immediately deleted. We never store your photos.

privacyFeatures.title: End-to-End Encryption
privacyFeatures.description: All data transmission is encrypted using industry-standard TLS 1.3 protocols.

privacyFeatures.title: Anonymous Processing
privacyFeatures.description: No personal identifiers are attached to your scans. Complete anonymity guaranteed.

privacyFeatures.title: Right to Delete
privacyFeatures.description: Request deletion of any data at any time. Full compliance with GDPR and CCPA.

about.teamDesc: Our team combines decades of experience in medicine, AI research, and healthcare technology.
about.partnersDesc: Collaborating with leading medical institutions worldwide
about.ctaTitle: Join Us in the Fight Against Oral Cancer
about.ctaSubtitle: Take the first step towards better oral health. Get your free screening today.

awareness.heroSubtitle: Knowledge is your first line of defense. Learn about the signs, risk factors, and prevention strategies for oral cancer.
awareness.symptomsDesc: Early detection significantly improves treatment outcomes. Be aware of these common symptoms.

symptomsList.title: Persistent Sores
symptomsList.description: Mouth sores that do not heal within 2-3 weeks

symptomsList.title: White or Red Patches
symptomsList.description: Unusual white (leukoplakia) or red (erythroplakia) patches on gums, tongue, or mouth lining

symptomsList.title: Lumps or Thickening
symptomsList.description: Unexplained lumps, bumps, or thickening of tissue in the mouth or neck

symptomsList.title: Difficulty Swallowing
symptomsList.description: Persistent difficulty or pain when swallowing, chewing, or moving the jaw

symptomsList.title: Numbness
symptomsList.description: Numbness or loss of feeling in the mouth, lips, or face

symptomsList.title: Voice Changes
symptomsList.description: Persistent hoarseness or changes in voice quality

riskList.title: Tobacco Use
riskList.description: Smoking and smokeless tobacco significantly increase risk

riskList.title: Alcohol Consumption
riskList.description: Heavy alcohol use, especially combined with tobacco

riskList.title: HPV Infection
riskList.description: Human papillomavirus (HPV) linked to oropharyngeal cancers

riskList.title: Sun Exposure
riskList.description: Excessive sun exposure increases lip cancer risk

preventionList.title: Quit Tobacco
preventionList.description: Stop smoking and avoid all tobacco products

preventionList.title: Limit Alcohol
preventionList.description: Reduce alcohol consumption or avoid entirely

preventionList.title: Healthy Diet
preventionList.description: Eat plenty of fruits and vegetables rich in antioxidants

preventionList.title: Sun Protection
preventionList.description: Use lip balm with SPF and limit sun exposure

preventionList.title: Oral Hygiene
preventionList.description: Maintain good oral hygiene and dental care

preventionList.title: Regular Screenings
preventionList.description: Get regular dental check-ups and oral cancer screenings

awareness.doctorDesc: Don't wait if you notice any concerning symptoms. Early consultation can make a significant difference.
doctorPoints: Unexplained lumps in mouth or neck

howItWorks.heroDesc: Our advanced screening process combines cutting-edge artificial intelligence with medical expertise to provide you with accurate, fast, and private oral cancer risk assessment.
howItWorks.stepsSubtitle: From image capture to results in under a minute

1.title: Capture Your Image
1.desc: Take a clear photo of your oral cavity or upload an existing image. Our guidelines help you capture the best possible image for accurate analysis.

2.title: Secure Upload
2.desc: Your image is securely uploaded using end-to-end encryption. We never store your personal data, and images are processed in real-time then immediately deleted.

3.title: AI Analysis
3.desc: Our advanced machine learning model, trained on thousands of clinical images, analyzes your photo for potential indicators of oral cancer.

4.title: Receive Results
4.desc: Get your comprehensive risk assessment with clear explanations, personalized recommendations, and guidance on next steps.

howItWorks.techSubtitle: Built on years of research and validated through rigorous clinical testing

1.title: Deep Learning Model
1.desc: Convolutional neural network trained on 100,000+ annotated clinical images

2.title: 95% Accuracy
2.desc: Validated against expert pathologist diagnoses in clinical trials

3.title: Real-time Processing
3.desc: Edge computing for instant analysis without cloud storage

4.title: Privacy First
4.desc: HIPAA compliant with zero data retention policy

howItWorks.resultsSubtitle: Clear, actionable insights designed to help you take the right next step.

1.title: Detailed Risk Report
1.desc: Easy-to-understand explanation of your screening result.

2.title: Personalized Recommendations
2.desc: Guidance on whether to monitor or consult a specialist.

3.title: Confidence Score
3.desc: AI confidence level to help interpret the assessment.

howItWorks.ctaSubtitle: Experience the power of AI-driven oral cancer screening. Fast, accurate, and completely private.

symptom.heroSubtitle: Early detection saves lives. Knowing the signs and symptoms is the first step towards prevention and timely treatment.

1.title: Persistent Mouth Ulcers
1.desc: Ulcers that do not heal within 2-3 weeks are the most common early sign.

2.title: White or Red Patches
2.desc: Velvety white (leukoplakia) or red (erythroplakia) patches inside the mouth.

3.title: Unexplained Lumps
3.desc: Thickening, lumps, or rough spots on the lips, gums, or inside the mouth.

4.title: Difficulty Swallowing
4.desc: Feeling like something is caught in your throat or pain when swallowing.

5.title: Persistent Sore Throat
5.desc: A chronic sore throat or hoarseness that doesn't go away.

6.title: Numbness or Pain
6.desc: Unexplained numbness, loss of feeling, or pain in any area of the face/mouth.

7.title: Loose Teeth
7.desc: Teeth becoming loose for no apparent reason or dentures not fitting.

8.title: Ear Pain
8.desc: Pain in the ear without any loss of hearing.

symptom.riskSubtitle: While anyone can develop oral cancer, certain behaviors and factors can significantly increase your risk.

1.title: Tobacco Use
1.desc: Smoking or chewing tobacco is the #1 risk factor.

2.title: Alcohol
2.desc: Heavy alcohol consumption increases risk significantly.

3.title: HPV Infection
3.desc: Human Papillomavirus is a growing cause of oral cancers.

4.title: Sun Exposure
4.desc: Excessive sun exposure is a major risk for lip cancer.

symptom.adviceTitle: When should you see a doctor?
symptom.adviceSubtitle: If you notice any of these symptoms lasting more than
symptom.adviceUrgent: Don't wait. Early stage oral cancer is highly treatable.
symptom.checkupsDesc: Regular dental visits are your best defense. Dentists are trained to spot early signs of oral cancer during routine exams.
